LanguageData.VAEI_Distracted.description: Severe loss of focus resulting in a greatly decreased work speed, caused by distractable trait.
LanguageData.VAEI_Distracted.label: distracted
LanguageData.VAEI_Focused.description: Extreme mental focus on the tasks at hand, greatly increasing the productivity.
LanguageData.VAEI_Focused.label: focused
LanguageData.VAEI_JoinedCult.label: joined cult
LanguageData.VAEI_MoodSwing.description: This pawn is experiencing mood swings, rapidly shifting between feelings of joy and sadness.
LanguageData.VAEI_MoodSwing.label: mood swing
LanguageData.VAEI_SacrificialHediff.description: A sacrificial mental state which will end upon successful arrest or death.
LanguageData.VAEI_SacrificialHediff.label: sacrificial mental state
